financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made a lot of money from selling expensive cars, which helped them earn more per car than ever before.
Despite some challenges, they managed their money well and stayed financially strong, which is why they got a high score.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is facing challenges due to new US tariffs and rising costs, which are affecting their profits.
Management is actively trying to improve the situation by negotiating better trade deals and cutting costs.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing well in taking care of the environment, but there's room for improvement.
Their management and decision-making practices are just okay, which affects their overall score.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their plans for the future, which is a good sign.
They admitted some challenges but focused on how they plan to grow, making investors feel positive.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company's leaders gave clear answers on some topics but were unclear on important areas like future plans and profits.
Only half of their answers were supported by specific facts, making it hard to fully trust their transparency.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company is facing big challenges like uncertain global demand and tariffs, which makes the future unclear.
Even though there are some good signs, like more money per car, investors should be careful because the overall outlook is not very positive.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Tata Motors is launching new products and focusing on electric vehicles, which is helping them grow despite some sales challenges.
The company is facing cost issues due to rising material prices and currency changes, which might affect their profits for a while.
